name: In a small flet
description:
As you slowly climb the ladder leading to the flet, the sound of quiet singing
can be heard.  When you finally get to the top you see a tall elven female in a
suit of bright chain mail.  She has a slender sword in hand, with which she is
expertly attacking a straw dummy.  The dummy looks hurt.  As you look around
you see a small bed and a stove.  A table with an eaten meal sits in one corner
and a large rack sits in the sun with herbs drying in it.  There are many
windows in the perfect position to fully light this small flet.
